---
authors:
  - name: Norah Jones
    affiliation: The University
    roles: writing
    corresponding: true
bibliography: references.bib
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document.
To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Preview** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code.
You can embed code like this:

```{r}
1 + 2
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 5
```

The `echo: false` option disables the printing of code (only output is displayed).

```{r}
# Source helper functions
source(list.files("R", full.names = TRUE))
```

```{r}
add_numbers(1, 1)
```


You can cite your sources, stored in bibliography.bib [@knuth84].
